field.title: crv
field.formula:
IF SUM([leads]) > 0
    THEN SUM([valid_leads]) / SUM([leads])
END

field.title: crq
field.formula:
IF SUM([leads]) > 0
    THEN SUM([qual]) / SUM([leads])
END

field.title: title-051db150-b441-11ee-9d28-49a6d32ad1b7
field.formula:
-- Считаем количество лидов без копий
-- Если пришел лид не из Инстаграма и если из Валидации
IF ([original_internal_id] IS NOT NULL 
   AND ([source_deal] != "Instagram. Валидация" OR [source_deal] = 'Валидация')) 
   THEN

    IF [original_internal_id] = [leads_id] THEN
        1
    ELSE
        0
    END
    
ELSEIF [leads_id] IS NOT NULL THEN
    1
ELSE
    0
END
field.guid_formula:
-- Считаем количество лидов без копий
-- Если пришел лид не из Инстаграма и если из Валидации
IF ([internal_lead_id_2r5o] IS NOT NULL 
   AND ([source_deal_v494] != "Instagram. Валидация" OR [source_deal_v494] = 'Валидация')) 
   THEN

    IF [internal_lead_id_2r5o] = [leads_id_bnq0] THEN
        1
    ELSE
        0
    END
    
ELSEIF [leads_id_bnq0] IS NOT NULL THEN
    1
ELSE
    0
END

field.title: cost2
field.formula:
IF [qual] > 0 THEN
    -- Считаем по старым правилам
    IF [date] < DATE("2024-01-01") THEN
        -- Считаем по бюджету
        IF [price] < 300000 THEN
            130
        ELSEIF [price] >= 300000 AND [price] < 500000 THEN
            160
        ELSEIF [price] >= 500000 AND [price] < 1000000 THEN
            180
        ELSEIF [price] >= 1000000 THEN
            200
        END
    -- Считаем по новым правилам с 01.01.24, где всегда 220
    ELSE
        220
    END
END

        -- Считаем по бюджету

        ELSEIF [price_4yjp] >= 500000 AND [price_4yjp] < 1000000 THEN

IF SUM([qual]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([cost2]) / SUM([qual])
END

items.title: title-75dce740-9514-11ee-ba14-ab9c49872b57
items.originalFormula:
IF [original_id] IS NOT NULL AND [original_internal_id] != [leads_id] THEN
    [original_date]
ELSEIF [creation_date] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [creation_date]
-- Рекламные источники
ELSEIF [day] IS NOT NULL AND [total_cost] > 0 THEN
    [day]
-- Facebook ads
ELSEIF [fb_source_date] IS NOT NULL AND [spend] > 0 THEN
    [fb_source_date]
END
